user.title: Welcome to TaskMate!
user.description: Set up your family chore management system. You can customize the points currency that children will earn.

data.points_name: Points Currency Name (e.g., Stars, Coins, Bucks)

add_chore.title: Add New Chore
add_chore.description: Create a new chore for your children

data.name: Chore Name
data.assigned_to: Assigned To (leave empty for all children)

data_description.daily_limit: How many times per day this chore can be completed
data_description.schedule_mode: Choose how this chore is scheduled — specific days of the week, or a repeating interval. The scheduling options will be configured on the next page.

add_chores_bulk.title: Add Multiple Chores
add_chores_bulk.description: Create multiple chores at once with the same settings. Enter chore names one per line or comma-separated.

data.chore_names: Chore Names (one per line or comma-separated)
data.assigned_to: Assigned To (leave empty for all children)

data_description.daily_limit: How many times per day this chore can be completed
data_description.schedule_mode: Choose how this chore is scheduled

data_description.daily_limit: How many times per day this chore can be completed
data_description.schedule_mode: Choose how this chore is scheduled — specific days of the week, or a repeating interval. The scheduling options will be configured on the next page.

add_reward.title: Add New Reward
add_reward.description: Create a reward that children can earn

data.name: Reward Name
data.assigned_to: Assigned To (leave empty for all children)

data_description.is_jackpot: Pool points from all assigned children toward one shared reward
data_description.cost: Number of points required to claim this reward

data_description.is_jackpot: Pool points from all assigned children toward one shared reward
data_description.cost: Number of points required to claim this reward

data_description.streak_reset_mode: What happens to a streak when a day is missed
data_description.history_days: How many days of chore completion history to retain (30–365)
data_description.weekend_multiplier: Points multiplier on Saturdays and Sundays (1.0 = disabled, 2.0 = double points)
data_description.streak_milestones_enabled: Award bonus points when children hit streak milestones (3, 7, 14, 30, 60, 100 days)
data_description.perfect_week_enabled: Award bonus points when a child completes at least one chore every day for a full week
data_description.perfect_week_bonus: Bonus points awarded for a perfect week
data_description.streak_milestones: Custom milestones as 'days:points' pairs, comma-separated. Example: 3:5, 7:10, 14:20, 30:50, 60:100, 100:200
data_description.notify_service: HA notification service to alert parents when a chore requires approval. Format: notify.mobile_app_your_phone — leave empty to use persistent notifications only

chore_schedule_specific.title: Step 2 — Specific Days
chore_schedule_specific.description: Choose which days of the week this chore should appear on the child card. Leave empty to show every day.

data_description.due_days: Select one or more days. Leave empty to show the chore every day. Use Due Days Mode on the child card to hide or dim chores on non-scheduled days.

edit_chore_schedule_specific.title: Step 2 — Specific Days
edit_chore_schedule_specific.description: Choose which days of the week this chore should appear on the child card. Leave empty to show every day.

data_description.due_days: Select one or more days. Leave empty to show the chore every day. Use Due Days Mode on the child card to hide or dim chores on non-scheduled days.

chore_schedule_recurring.title: Step 2 — Recurring Schedule
chore_schedule_recurring.description: Set how often this chore can be completed. Once completed, it will not be available again until the window resets.

data_description.recurrence: How often the chore can be completed
data_description.recurrence_day: For Weekly and Every 2 Weeks — pin the chore to a specific day. Leave empty to allow completion on any day.
data_description.recurrence_start: For Every 2 Days — enter an anchor date in YYYY-MM-DD format to set the rhythm. Leave empty to use today as the start.
data_description.first_occurrence_mode: Available Immediately — child can complete it straight away. Wait for First Occurrence — chore is locked until the first scheduled day arrives.

edit_chore_schedule_recurring.title: Step 2 — Recurring Schedule
edit_chore_schedule_recurring.description: Set how often this chore can be completed. Once completed, it will not be available again until the window resets.

data_description.recurrence: How often the chore can be completed
data_description.recurrence_day: For Weekly and Every 2 Weeks — pin the chore to a specific day. Leave empty to allow completion on any day.
data_description.recurrence_start: For Every 2 Days — enter an anchor date in YYYY-MM-DD format to set the rhythm. Leave empty to use today as the start.
data_description.first_occurrence_mode: Available Immediately — child can complete it straight away. Wait for First Occurrence — chore is locked until the first scheduled day arrives.

error.invalid_milestone_format: Invalid milestone format — use days:points pairs, e.g. 3:5, 7:10, 14:20
